level_signals: Minimum 10+ years managing software development projects
Proven leadership in cross-functional team settings

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Minimum 10+ years managing software development projects.
Education: Bachelor's in Computer Science or equivalent, and/or other work experience in a technical setting. Master's degree preferred.
Proven experience in leading product management, business analysis, and software engineering teams to deliver high-impact solutions.
Hands-on experience in building ETL framework products as well as data modeling.
Strong technical background with experience in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and microservices architecture, particularly in designing and scaling ETL services.
Strong technical background with experience in various ETL technologies and vendors.
Experience integrating ETL tools into CI/CD pipelines, with an understanding of DevOps tools and principles (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab, Docker, Kubernetes).
Expertise in monitoring, scaling, and optimizing ETL performance, including latency reduction and throughput optimization.
Experience in managing data integration, including knowledge of data formats (JSON, XML) and data consistency models in distributed systems.
Proven experience working within Agile development frameworks (e.g., Scrum, Kanban), leading sprints, and using tools like Jira or Trello.
Experience in building exception management functionality for ETL tools.
Proven leadership in cross-functional team settings, fostering collaboration between engineering, product, and external stakeholders.
Knowledge of regulatory requirements (e.g., GDPR, CCPA, PSD2) and compliance consideration for ETL development in financial services.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in Financial Services is preferred.

scope.surface: ETL integration platform for Charles River Investment Management Solution (CRIMS) and State Street Alpha
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise investment management platform serving institutional clients
core_responsibilities: Help establish strategic roadmap for ETL integration frameworks for consistent data integration methodologies at platform level
Perform business and technical analyses to help expand and innovate CRD ETL capabilities and tools for various application technology backends
Build detailed roadmaps and requirements for engineering teams
Gather and prioritize customer, market and internal requirement
Collaborate with engineering, architecture, and client-facing teams to define detailed product specifications and guide delivery efforts
Define product specifications and lead engineering teams
Represent the Platform Product team across the organization and externally with clients and vendors
Ensure ETL performance, scalability, and security best practices are embedded throughout the ETL frameworks

compensation.notes: Minimum salary stated as zł282,000 PLN annual; USD conversion not provided

10+ years minimum is a high bar that may narrow applicant pool significantly

Manages via influence but no direct reports mentioned — VP title may not reflect typical VP people-management scope
